data.content: Tightened the Setlist summary header spacing by overriding the local card gap to about five pixels and promoted the Setlist label to the same text-base, semibold, tracking-tight section heading treatment used by Escalations. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. The beats view switcher already used semibold button typography for Setlist and Escalations, so no nav-tab code change was needed.
